data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Perlis & Kedah, Penang, Perak, Selangor, N. Sembilan and Melaka until 5:00PM; Thursday, 25 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Perlis & Kedah, Pulau Pinang, Perak, Selangor, N. Sembilan dan Melaka sehingga 5:00 petang; Khamis, 25 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Phuket, Straits of Melaka, Samui, Condore, Reef North, southern part of Reef South, Layang-Layang, Palawan and Sulu until 5:00PM; Thursday, 25 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket, Selat Melaka, Samui, Condore, Reef North, selatan Reef South, Layang-Layang, Palawan dan Sulu sehingga 5:00 petang; Khamis, 25 Jun 2026.

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket until Saturday, 27 June 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket sehingga Sabtu, 27 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Perlis ;  Kedah  (Langkawi, Kubang Pasu, Kota Setar, Pokok Sena, Padang Terap, Yan, Pendang, Kuala Muda, Sik, Baling and Kulim);  Penang  (North Seberang Perai);  Perak  (Kuala Kangsar, Manjung, Kinta, Perak Tengah, Kampar, Bagan Datuk, Hilir Perak and Batang Padang);  Terengganu  (Besut, Setiu and Kuala Nerus);  Selangor  (Gombak, Petaling, Hulu Langat and Sepang);  FT Kuala Lumpur ;  FT Putrajaya ;  Negeri Sembilan  (Jempol and Tampin);  Johor  (Segamat, Kluang, Mersing, Pontian and Kulai); and  Sarawak:  Sarikei (Julau), Sibu (Kanowit), Kapit (Song) and Miri (Subis) until 6:00PM; Thursday, 25 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Perlis ;  Kedah  (Langkawi, Kubang Pasu, Kota Setar, Pokok Sena, Padang Terap, Yan, Pendang, Kuala Muda, Sik, Baling dan Kulim);  Pulau Pinang  (Seberang Perai Utara);  Perak  (Kuala Kangsar, Manjung, Kinta, Perak Tengah, Kampar, Bagan Datuk, Hilir Perak dan Batang Padang);  Terengganu  (Besut, Setiu dan Kuala Nerus);  Selangor  (Gombak, Petaling, Hulu Langat dan Sepang);  WP Kuala Lumpur ;  WP Putrajaya ;  Negeri Sembilan  (Jempol dan Tampin);  Johor  (Segamat, Kluang, Mersing, Pontian dan Kulai); dan  Sarawak:  Sarikei (Julau), Sibu (Kanowit), Kapit (Song) dan Miri (Subis) sehingga 6:00 petang; Khamis, 25 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: No Tropical Cyclone system is observed under MMD monitoring region (Latitude: 0-20 North & Longitude: 95-130 East)
data.text_bm: Tiada sistem Siklon Tropika dicerap di dalam kawasan pemantauan MMD (Latitud: 0-20 Utara & Longitud: 95-130 Timur)
